event.title: International Conference on NLP, AI, Computer Science & Engineering (NLAICSE 2024) (online)

body.p: International Conference on NLP, AI, Computer Science & Engineering (NLAICSE 2024) will provide an excellent international forum for sharing knowledge and results in theory, methodology and applications of NLP, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science & Engineering Techniques. The Conference looks for significant contributions to all major fields of NLP, Artificial Intelligence and Computer Science & Engineering in theoretical and practical aspects.The aim of the Conference is to provide a platform to the researchers and practitioners from both academia as well as industry to meet and share cutting-edge development in the field.
